Best Solana rug checkers show context, not certainty

No scanner can guarantee safety, but the right one can surface enough visible risk signals to avoid blind entries.

Open SlimeWire rug checker page

Rug-check signals

Liquidity

Thin liquidity can make exits painful and price impact severe.

Holder concentration

Large clustered holders can change market risk quickly.

Authority notes

Mint, freeze, and token-program signals should be visible when available.

Metadata and socials

Missing links or low-quality metadata can be a useful caution signal.

Chart structure

A scanner is stronger when it connects risk context to charts and transactions.

Clear warnings

Good tools say what is known, what is unknown, and what still requires user judgment.
